title: New feature: Filter item by year
excerpt: I would love tobe able to filter my activities not just by YTD but by year! :slight_smile:

posts.author: martinaehlebracht (Martina Ehlebracht)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love tobe able to filter my activities not just by YTD but by year!

posts.author: Tara-Horn (Tara Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I agree!! It is so critical to be able to view dashboards comparing year over year and not just month. This should be added as a filter to the date column

posts.author: cgodbou (Charles Godbout)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday !

I would also like to have the possibility to filter by Year and I would add to this: by Quarter.
Not only by day, workdays, week and month.

This kind of filtering is critical in our reports.

Thanks !
